content.rendered:
Vision

Enfant Cheri Study Centre, Inc. envisions the Cherians to be effective communicators, critical and creative thinkers and globally competitive individuals who are prepared for the next phase of their life’s journey, the tertiary education or the world of work.

Mission

Enfant Cheri is committed to the youth’s holistic development in pursuit of academic excellence complemented by a kind and firm discipline exercised within the context of academic freedom and school-parent partnership.
It seeks to strengthen the learners’ belief in a Supreme Being regardless of religious denominations, race and ethnicity.
